note: WKD advanced-method local-part hashing per draft-koch-openpgp-webkey-service. The local part is lower-cased, SHA-1 hashed, and the 20-byte digest is z-base32 encoded to a fixed 32-char string. These vectors are deterministic and were computed offline with node:crypto (no OpenPGP needed); the joe.doe vector matches the canonical example in the WKD draft.
